There is a divided opinion among
the merchants as to the real value
of the freight rate decision given
in favor Of Spokane. While all
agree that 1t will help, the amount
of benefit can not be determined
until the new rates are studied out
in full and any jokers that may be
buried in the decision brought to
the surface.


The Inland Empire electric sys-
tenn has given fare and "
rates for the Fourth of July.


A meeting under the auspices Of
the Spokane Society of Social and
Moral Hygiene will be held tonight
at the Holmes school.
